visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man with dark, curly hair in a dimly lit, green-hued environment. He has a serious and intense expression, staring intently forward. The background is dark and out of focus, with soft, blurry lights creating a bokeh effect. In the top right corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The camera remains steady, capturing the man's unwavering gaze. The audio consists solely of a tense and suspenseful electronic music track. A deep, pulsing bassline and a steady, rhythmic beat create a driving, modern soundscape. The music has a dark and serious mood, building a sense of anticipation and gravity, as if leading up to a significant confrontation or a critical moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a different man in a similar dark, nighttime setting. He has short, dark hair and is looking slightly down and to the side with a somber expression. The background is dark with out-of-focus green lights. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting a handheld camera.
